query: Spirit of the Rivers Loppet cross country ski race Prince George

videos.title: Local Families Take in Annual Spirit of the Rivers Loppet
videos.description: The turnaround in the weather was timed perfectly for an annual outdoor event in Prince George. The Otway Nordic Centre hosted the Spirit of the Rivers Loppet: a fun recreational way for families to spend a day outside.

videos.title: 2010 Golden Nordic Club's Huckleberry Loppet
videos.description: One of the hilights of the Nordic Skiing Season at Golden BC is the annual Huckleberry  Loppet Race.  This year it was the 14th annual,  and  was held on January 31 on the Dawn Mountain Trails at Kicking Horse Resort and attracted over 120 competitors of every age group. They  had a number of different categories from 1 km, to 20km and it was a perfect day with a little new snow coming down and temperatures hovering just below 0C.  Great day, and a great race.

videos.title: After Record Snowstorm, Pop-Up Ski Race In Minneapolis
videos.description: John Munger, the executive director of the Loppet Foundation, says the skiers were “ecstatic” about the race Monday morning (0:44). WCCO 4 News At Noon – April 16, 2018
